name: BOGEY HILLS GOLF ACADEMY & PERFORMANCE INSTITUTE
address: 1120 Country Club Rd, St Charles, MO 63303
about: Bogey Hills Golf Academy and Performance Institute is a professional coaching facility located within Bogey Hills Country Club in Saint Charles, Missouri. The venue focuses on comprehensive game improvement by integrating golf instruction with fitness, nutrition, and performance training. They utilize advanced technology, specifically TrackMan radar tracking, to provide detailed swing analysis and feedback. The academy is led by Dennis Walters Jr., a coach with over a decade of experience who designs personalized programs for students ranging from juniors to tour professionals. The facility emphasizes a team-oriented approach to help athletes become well-rounded players, offering services both on the course and in the simulator.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan 4 radar technology for precise data analysis
Comprehensive instruction including fitness and nutrition
Experienced professional coaching with Dennis Walters Jr
Flexible lesson packages and subscription models
Ability to practice year-round in the simulator
Located within the scenic Bogey Hills Country Club

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the academy also offers club fitting services and can assist with equipment needs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Information not explicitly provided, though the venue is situated within a country club which typically has dining policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On the TrackMan simulator, playing 18 holes typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy is very kid-friendly and offers specific programs and coaching for juniors and youth of all skill levels.
